title: In-app spaced-repetition scheduling (local-only, no accounts)
context: In-app spaced-repetition scheduling builds on the export deck to help learners retain civics facts, kept strictly local-only with no accounts and no PII.
objective: Add local-only spaced-repetition scheduling in the app, PII-free and account-free.
acceptanceCriteria: Spaced-repetition scheduling runs entirely on-device with no accounts and no PII
Builds on the exported spaced-repetition deck format without server dependence
